sourceList.title: Foundation for Medieval Genealogy - TADDEA da Carrara .

zh.lifeSummary: 當Taddea da Carrara於1304年出生在義大利維圖維洛納時，她的父親Jacopo or Giacomo I da CARRARA "The Great - 1st Lord of Padua or signore"40歲，母親Elisabetta Gradenigo29歲。她和Don Cangrande I Della Scala至少有1個兒子。她去世於1351年6月2日在她的家鄉享年47歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Taddea da Carrara于1304年出生在意大利維圖維洛納时，她的父亲Jacopo or Giacomo I da CARRARA "The Great - 1st Lord of Padua or signore"40岁，母亲Elisabetta Gradenigo29岁。她和Don Cangrande I Della Scala至少有1个儿子。她去世于1351年6月2日在她的家乡享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: da
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Mandarin form of the surname 達, said to be derived from the personal name Shu Da (叔達), a talent during the reign of the legendary king Zhuanxu (traditional dates: 2514–2437  BC ); or adopted as a Han surname by other minority ethnic groups.
Mandarin form of the surname 笪, a surname originating in ancient Jianzhou (located in present-day Fujian province) and Jurong (located in Jiangsu province) or a surname from the Hui ethnic group.

nameMeanings.name: Carrara
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Guido, Angelo, Alessandro, Amerigo, Antonio, Arrigo, Carlo, Enzo, Gaetano, Giovanni, Guerino.
Italian (southern): habitational name from any of various places called Carrara, from Latin carraria ‘quarry’.

nameMeanings.name: Taddea
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Taddea da Carrara was born in 1304, in Verona, Veneto, Italy, her father, Jacopo or Giacomo I da CARRARA "The Great - 1st Lord of Padua or signore", was 40 and her mother, Elisabetta Gradenigo, was 29. She had at least 1 son with Don Cangrande I Della Scala. She died on 2 June 1351, in her hometown, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Taddea da Carrara est née en 1304, à Verona, Veneto, Italie, son père, Jacopo or Giacomo I da CARRARA "The Great - 1st Lord of Padua or signore", avait 40 ans et sa mère, Elisabetta Gradenigo, avait 29 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec Don Cangrande I Della Scala. Elle est décédée le 2 juin 1351, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Taddea da Carrara 1304 in Verona, Veneto, Italien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Jacopo or Giacomo I da CARRARA "The Great - 1st Lord of Padua or signore" 40 und ihre Mutter Elisabetta Gradenigo 29. Sie hatte mit Don Cangrande I Della Scala mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 2. Juni 1351 im Alter von 47 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Taddea da Carrara è nata il nel 1304 nel Verona, Veneto, Italia, sua padre, Jacopo or Giacomo I da CARRARA "The Great - 1st Lord of Padua or signore", aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Elisabetta Gradenigo, aveva 29 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio con Don Cangrande I Della Scala. Morì il 2 giugno 1351, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 47 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Taddea da Carraraが1304年にイタリアベンエトーバーオナで生まれた時，父Jacopo or Giacomo I da CARRARA "The Great - 1st Lord of Padua or signore"は40歳，母Elisabetta Gradenigoは29歳であった。彼女はDon Cangrande I Della Scalaとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1351年6月2日に故郷で47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Taddea da Carrara(이)가 1304년 이탈리아 븐토 베로나에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Jacopo or Giacomo I da CARRARA "The Great - 1st Lord of Padua or signore"(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elisabetta Gradenigo(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 Don Cangrande I Della Scala(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1351년 6월 2일 그녀의 고향에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Taddea da Carrara nasceu em 1304, em Verona, Veneto, Itália, seu pai, Jacopo or Giacomo I da CARRARA "The Great - 1st Lord of Padua or signore", tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Elisabetta Gradenigo, tinha 29 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho com Don Cangrande I Della Scala. Ela faleceu em 2 de junho de 1351, em sua cidade natal, com 47 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Taddea da Carrara родилась в 1304 г. в местности вирона, винето, Италия, её отцу по имени Jacopo or Giacomo I da CARRARA "The Great - 1st Lord of Padua or signore" было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Elisabetta Gradenigo, 29. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от Don Cangrande I Della Scala. Она умерла 2 июня 1351 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 47 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Taddea da Carrara nació en 1304, en Verona, Veneto, Italia, su papá, Jacopo or Giacomo I da CARRARA "The Great - 1st Lord of Padua or signore", tenía 40 años y su mamá, Elisabetta Gradenigo, tenía 29 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Don Cangrande I Della Scala. Murió el 2 de junio de 1351, en su pueblo, a la edad de 47 años.
